backlog.title: 5-model 24/7 debating R&D team
backlog.description: Captured for later phase, once product launches are live and revenue validation is underway.

backlog.title: Daily microapp factory
backlog.description: Strong idea for continuous improvement, but not before the current product launch path ships.

inProgress.title: UK Tax Navigator launch
inProgress.description: GTM, landing page, Gumroad listing, launch posts, and email sequence are being assembled for the first live validation push.

inProgress.title: Business Cash Flow Forecaster follow-on launch
inProgress.description: Second release being prepared behind UK Tax Navigator, with landing page and launch assets underway.

inReview.title: Mission Control live operating board
inReview.description: Structure is in place. Next question is how much of it should be auto-fed from workspace state versus manually curated.

completed.title: GitHub Pages dashboard published
completed.description: Mission Control is now live as a multi-page dashboard and visible across devices.

completed.title: Agents page added
completed.description: Dedicated agent tab live with status signals and SOUL-style summaries.

blocked.title: Shared editing for Projects page
blocked.description: Static GitHub Pages can read shared repo data, but cannot safely write synced edits without a backend layer.
